title: neonauclea mollis
intro: Neonauclea mollis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the velvet leaf or velvet tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Neonauclea mollis are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and preventing infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in the form of a poultice or salve to apply topically.
